subcodes.first_line: O promoter of the religion of God! Although the wondrous journey hath not yet arrived, that blessed book, the Gulshan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مروج دین الله هر چند سفر بدیع تا بحال نرسیده ولی چون آن کتاب مستطاب گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @review of publications, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
